programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: The Beach Boys - Good Vibrations Tour
programme.desc: The Beach Boys Special is a rockumentary which explores the life of the Beach Boys as camera and crews follow them across the United States on their Good Vibrations Tour.

programme.title: Alabama & Friends - Live at the Ryman
programme.desc: Join superstar band Alabama, recorded at the historic Ryman Auditorium, featuring on stage collaborations with country's biggest stars: Luke Bryan, Jason Aldean, Trisha Yearwood, Florida Georgia Line, Jamey Johnson and the Eli Young Band.

programme.title: ZZ Top - Live at Montreux
programme.desc: ZZ Top has made a number of visits to Montreux and this concert from 2013 is undoubtedly one of their finest live performances. The set list blends tracks from early seventies through their eighties blockbuster period and up to their most recent rele...

programme.title: Journey - Live in Manila
programme.desc: On March 14, 2009, Journey returned to Arnel Pineda's homeland and introduced him as their newest lead singer to a crowd of nearly 30,000 at the SM Mall of Asia Concert Grounds. Features songs such as Don't Stop Believin', Stone In Love, When You Lov...

programme.title: John Denver - Rocky Mountain High: Live In Japan
programme.desc: Rocky Mountain High: Live In Japan is a 1981 concert from John Denver's 7-show tour of Japan and features a wonderful selection of hits from his career, including: Annie's Song, Calypso, Sunshine On My Shoulders & Thank God I'm A Country Boy.

programme.title: Jerry Lee Lewis - Jerry Lee Lewis and Friends
programme.desc: This concert, recorded at London's Hammersmith Apollo in 1989, features Lewis in performances of his classic tracks all delivered in his own inimitable way. Joining him on stage are a great list of guests including Van Morrison, Dave Edmunds, and mor...

programme.title: John Lee Hooker - Live At Montreux 1990
programme.desc: The legendary bluesman John Lee Hooker brought his boogie style blend of rhythm & blues to deliver two blistering performances at the Montreux Jazz Festival in 1983 and 1990.

programme.title: Stevie Ray Vaughan - Lonestar
programme.desc: This film traces and reveals The Full, Previously Untold Story Of Stevie Ray Vaughan's Glory Years, the period between the release of his debut album and his tragic death in a helicopter crash in 1989.

programme.title: Stingray Djazz
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: It's Showtime at the Apollo
programme.desc: It's Showtime at the Apollo is a syndicated music television show, first broadcast on September 12, 1987. The show features live performances from both professional and up-and-coming artists, and also features the Amateur Night competition.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Former heavyweight boxing champion Muhammad Ali is interviewed.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Mrs. Georgia Jackson, mother of slain Soledad Brother George Jackson, is interviewed by producer- Ellis Haizlip. Other show features include the exciting Latin-jazz sounds of seven man combo.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: This program traces the roots of Black protest in America by means of passages from Frederick Douglass' greatest orations, dramatized by Arthur Bufghardt, interspersed with performances by drummer Max Roach.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Author James Baldwin is interviewed by the young Black poetess Nikki Giovanni in a special two-part presentation of Soul!, taped in London.

programme.title: Hamilton: One Shot To Broadway
programme.desc: The story of the hit musical that changed Broadway forever and brought the genius of Lin Manuel Miranda to the attention of legions of fans across the world. Featuring interviews with Miranda, as well as the cast and crew of Hamilton.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Former heavyweight boxing champion Muhammad Ali, South African born singer Miriam Makeba and a three-man vocal group called the Delfonics, share the spotlight with guest-host Nikki Giovanni, who opens the show with her "Kidnap Poem".

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Singer Jerry Butler headlines this episode, together with his back-up group, Peaches. Highlights of their numbers are "Make It Easy on Yourself" and "Brand New Me".

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: An all jazz line-up on this edition of Soul! features pianist Horace Silver at the electric keyboard, Lee Morgan on trumpet and 22-year old Bobbi Humphrey playing the flute. They are joined by vocalists Andy and Salome Bey.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: One of the great Motown acts of the past several years headlines the show, performing the hit, "I Heard It through the Grapevine", and other selections.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Highlights feature guest Al Green singing "Let's Stay Together" and author Verta Mae Grosvenor reading form her latest book, Thursdays and Every Other Sunday Off.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross invites you for a walk on the shore; soothing waves rolling in from the sea to the palm trees - all in a delightful seashell shape on the canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross to a picturesque spot in the meadow and delight in the discovery of not one, but two serene fishing holes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a proud strong windmill, standing in watch beside old farm buildings where happy little animals lay still in the night.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Find yourself in a place just like this on a warm summer day - Bob Ross creates clear sky and shade trees by a nice swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Prepare the canvas just-so, and in the end, you'll have a Bob Ross landscape -- mighty mountain, homey cabin, and meadow -- in a window!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: From a quiet spot by this smooth-stoned river, join Bob Ross for a very, very distant view of a lovely snow-covered mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses a golden selection of colors in this gorgeous fall mountain scene, all within a cleverly different oval shape on the canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a hike with Bob Ross to the southwestern region, see the beauty of fresh skies over sun-glistened mountains and silvery mere.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses beautiful shades of green that burst forth in this exciting and realistic display of nature's wonder.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins makes sure the chill of autumn is felt creeping in on the banks of a winding creek.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic - the majestic snow-covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes, and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Ice cold pond, snowy-covered banks, soft hues in the sky … Bob Ross teaches us to admire the simple beauty of nature.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A visit with Bob Ross takes you to a secluded cabin, snuggled deep into the blankety drifts of fluffy snow, far into the frozen mountains.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Paint along with Bob Ross and discover the beauty of a secluded log home with only quiet pond and rustic trees for companionship.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch and learn as Bob Ross unfolds this beautifully soft wooded scene with gently rippling brook, all inside an oval shape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins recalls memories of summers past in this scene originally painted on July 4, 1995.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest Artist Joyce Ortner captures the true beauty of the ocean waves, blue and enchanting in this breathtaking seascape masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Discover a purple night-sky scene with a mountain overlooking a little falling river -- Bob Ross creates a spectacular masterpiece today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Hike into the midst of a snow-covered forest with Bob Ross and enjoy the beauty of leafless trees in slumber and texture you can almost feel.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel deep into the forest with Bob Ross and discover the beauty and serenity of an elegant waterfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross puts a lonesome cabin in the middle of a snowy setting as an unexpected place of respite for the weary traveler.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The beach is such a lovely sight as afternoon comes to an end - Bob Ross paints this seascape with gold, purple and orange hues.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Real or imaginary? It doesn't matter which as Bob Ross captures a great mountain and forest scene on specially cut plywood!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Beautiful foliage and fierce skies with an almighty mountain overlooking a calm lake. Watch Bob Ross paint this challenging scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Such magnificent power and vibrant color in the sea and sky! Watch Bob Ross as he tries to tame this beautiful ocean painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross as he paints some of Nature's most awesome creations - magnificent snow-covered mountains! Beauty you just have to experience.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch and learn as Bob Ross creates crashing waves in this moonlit setting - see what a simple black canvas can do.

programme.desc: The kids desperately want an end to the boring baseball season. The problem is, they keep winning.

programme.title: Drunk History

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Robert E. Lee's estate becomes a burial ground for Union soldiers, counterfeiters attempt to steal Abraham Lincoln's body, and an embalmed bandit makes his way around the country. Featuring Jason Ritter, Justin Long and Jimmy O. Yang.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Questlove, Method Man, Raven-Symone and more celebrate the early history of hip hop, the man known for inventing Motown, Berry Gordy, and "Star Trek" actress Nichelle Nichols's incredible activism on and off the TV screen.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: An Italian handyman steals the "Mona Lisa," the "Santa bandits" rob a bank in Texas, and Mossad agents capture a Nazi general in Argentina. Featuring Jack Black, Johnny Knoxville, Tony Hale, "Weird Al" Yankovic and Rachel Bloom.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Joan of Arc leads the French during the Hundred Years' War, Mongol leader Genghis Khan rises to power, and Mansa Musa leads a pilgrimage to Mecca. Featuring Vanessa Hudgens, Randall Park and Donald Faison.

programme.title: MST3K: Star Force: Fugitive Alien II
programme.desc: Ken and the crew of the Bacchus 3 return in Star Force: Fugitive Alien II (1987) while Joel and the Bots make a Captain Joe action figure and stage a "name that puppet" quiz show.

programme.title: MST3K: The Bubble
programme.desc: Joel's crew watch as a married couple find themselves trapped in a mysterious town in THE BUBBLE (1966). The test subjects hatch a plan to escape.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Village of the Giants

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: King Dinosaur
programme.desc: In King Dinosaur, the crew pokes fun as scientists are terrorized by snakes, bugs, and dinosaurs on a newly discovered planet.

programme.title: MST3K: Racket Girls
programme.desc: A gym owner gets into trouble, becoming the target of the mob and the law. The 1950 short presents a high school couple rushing into marriage, and the marriage counselor who talks them out of it.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A charming rhyme for children that teaches them the alphabet, including many now politically-incorrect things, dangerous sequences, and some plagiarism. In the second episode, an animated pixie named Coily grants a man his wish that all springs disappear.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: The first installment of the 1939 serial starring Bela Lugosi.

programme.title: MST3K: Santo In The Treasure Of Dracula
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watch SANTO IN THE TREASURE OF DRACULA (1969). The Mads introduce the Gizmoplex.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: Friendly Patrolman Hal Jackson visits the Dixon family to instruct their youngest son, Alan, in the art of safe and courteous driving.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: It's Heaven vs. Hell in this short. Plus: bread?

programme.title: MST3K: The Shape Of Things To Come
programme.desc: Emily's crew watch three humans and their robot friend defend the moon colonies in H.G. Well's THE SHAPE OF THINGS TO COME (1979).

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A group of men kidnap a wealthy businessman and take others who were standing near. Alex is one of the people kidnapped. While the kidnappers are arranging for ransom, Alex manages to call Walker with information to help him find them.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver endures one of his most horrifying experiences as he tries to stop a nuclear reactor from exploding and contaminating a community.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver teams with a beautiful defector when he's asked to identify the double agent responsible for the deaths of three agents.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver meets a gorgeous woman in Bulgaria and falls prey to militiamen after the beauty slips some jewels into his pocket.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: A seriously injured MacGyver finds himself in Soviet-dominated Afghanistan and befriended by a young Afghan boy.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A spat between a girl and her boyfriend leads to an apparent murder, leaving the girl and her mother with a dead body, just as dinner guests Mark and Amanda arrive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A madman charges into a Lamaze class with a bomb, claiming that a fertility doctor was cheating him. Everything is complicated further when said doctor turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Ratings seeking stunts by TV talk show hosts Darren & Mary have tragic results.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a rash of deaths at a high school revolves around one 'helpful' young girl, Dr. Sloan risks his own life to uncover the murderer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates to find out who's behind the death of a driver in a speedway crash.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a young girl is rushed into the hospital in need of immediate treatment but dies due to an HMO's negligence, Dr. Travis and Community General are sued for negligence. Dr. Sloan must choose between his ethical convictions and the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The Matthews family has reunited after years apart. Here, Ryan and Tess Matthews come to LA to help Kate when she's in trouble with a con man.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Travis gets involved in the treacherous and deadly trade of catering when he oversees the annual charity banquet.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: The small northwest town of Twin Peaks, Washington is shaken up when the body of the Homecoming Queen, Laura Palmer, is discovered washed up on a riverbank, wrapped in plastic.

programme.title: The Gambler (1974)
programme.desc: James Caan portrays a compulsive gambler who can't quit or win. He falls into debt to the mob for $40,000 but seems to relish the thrill of gambling against the long shot.

programme.title: Love And Bullets
programme.desc: The FBI sends a loner (Charles Bronson) to kidnap a mobster's mistress in Switzerland.

programme.title: Hair

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Saturday Night Fever
programme.desc: John Travolta performs as the troubled Tony Manero - Brooklyn paint store clerk by day and undisputed king of the dance floor by night. A powerful and provocative urban tragedy that carries as much significance today as it did in 1977.

programme.title: The Gambler (1974)
programme.desc: James Caan portrays a compulsive gambler who can't quit or win. He falls into debt to the mob for $40,000 but seems to relish the thrill of gambling against the long shot.

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II
programme.desc: Just as the eccentric Australian is starting to adjust to life in New York City, Dundee and his beautiful girlfriend (Linda Kozlowski) are targeted for death by a gang of ruthless drug dealers.

programme.title: Summer School
programme.desc: Schools out, and Ocean Front High gym teacher Freddy Shoop (Mark Harmon) has big plans: summer in Hawaii. But the schools vice-principal has plans for Freddy, too: teaching remedial English. Aloha paradise - hello, Summer School.

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee
programme.desc: Michael J. Crocodile Dundee is a free-spirited Australian who hunts crocodiles with his bare hands, stares down giant water buffaloes, and drinks mere mortals under the table.

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II
programme.desc: Just as the eccentric Australian is starting to adjust to life in New York City, Dundee and his beautiful girlfriend (Linda Kozlowski) are targeted for death by a gang of ruthless drug dealers.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: Next of Kin
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: This confrontation between good and evil stars Kevin Costner as federal agent Eliot Ness, Robert De Niro as gangland kingpin Al Capone, and Sean Connery as Malone, the cop who teaches Ness how to beat the mob: shoot fast and shoot first.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: Sandra Bullock, Dennis Miller and Jeremy Northam star in this hit thriller about a computer expert whose life is "erased" by a computer conspiracy. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Johnny Mnemonic
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves is a space-age courier who's plugged in, turned on and buffed up to deliver the most important data of the 21st century, wet-wired directly into his brain! A rapid-fire roller coaster of action and high-impact imagery! Rating: R

programme.title: Flatliners
programme.desc: Are you afraid to die? Kiefer Sutherland isn't. He's an ambitious, charismatic medical student who persuades classmates Julia Roberts and Kevin Bacon to take part in a reckless experiment. Rated: R

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: The Time Machine
programme.desc: Hoping to alter the events of the past, a 19th-century inventor instead travels 800,000 years into the future, where he finds humankind divided into two warring races.

programme.title: The Italian Job (2003)
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime. The one thing that he didn't plan on was being double-crossed.

programme.title: Driven
programme.desc: Talented rookie race-car driver Jimmy Bly (Kip Pardue) has started losing his focus and begins to slip in the race rankings. It's no wonder, with the immense pressure being shoveled on him by his overly ambitious promoter brother.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky
programme.desc: Young and wealthy, David can have anything his heart desires. But his life seems incomplete. One night, David meets the woman of his dreams and believes he may have found the missing piece.

programme.title: Beach Party
programme.desc: It's the film that launched a genre and an iconic screen pairing as Frankie Avalon and Annette Funicello team for the first time for sand, surf and fun as an anthropologist (Robert Cummings) studies the wild dating habits of Malibu teenagers!

programme.title: Muscle Beach Party
programme.desc: Frankie Avalon and Annette Funicello and the gang are back together in the 2nd of American International's Beach Party films and this time the beach is overrun by muscle men and their obnoxious trainer.

programme.title: Bikini Beach
programme.desc: There are big waves crashing at Bikini Beach! The beach is close to becoming a retirement village. And a British pop star comes between Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon). Will it all be resolved by the end of summer vacation?

programme.title: Pajama Party
programme.desc: When a Martian scout named Go-Go is sent to explore Earth for a possible conquest, he lands in the middle of a wild, teenage pajama party, giving Mars second thoughts about invasion...and turning the party into an out-of-this-world cosmic shindig!

programme.title: Beach Blanket Bingo
programme.desc: When a publicity stunt to promote the singing career of Sugar Kane (Linda Evans) balloons out of control, Frankie (Frankie Avalon), Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) and the gang are pulled into the ensuing comic adventures.

programme.title: Ski Party
programme.desc: Rival groups--one rich and serious, the other party animals--do battle in this comedy set at a mountain resort's ski school.

programme.title: How to Stuff a Wild Bikini
programme.desc: While stationed in Tahiti, Frankie (Frankie Avalon) learns he’s in danger of losing Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) to another guy! That is, until a wacky witch doctor (Buster Keaton) conjures up a gorgeous bikini-clad vixen...whom no man can resist!

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt hurdles into spectacular new adventures from Rome to Shanghai as he races to rescue a captured agent and stop Davian from eliminating his next target, Ethan’s wife.

programme.title: Dark Tide
programme.desc: A traumatized shark expert (Halle Berry) must battle her own fears to lead a thrill-seeking businessman on a dive into a dangerous section of water known as "Shark Alley."

programme.title: Rogue
programme.desc: A cynical American travel writer is among the stranded riverboat passengers who become fodder for a monstrous crocodile.

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Hunter and collector Frank Walsh sails to America with a priceless white jaguar and a dangerous political assassin. When the prisoner manages to break free, Walsh must utilize his expert skills to capture the dangerous killer -- not dead, but alive.

programme.title: Bait
programme.desc: A freak tsunami traps a group of people in a submerged grocery store. As they try to escape, they are hunted by white sharks that are hungry for meat.

programme.title: Killer Whale
programme.desc: Best friends Maddie and Trish embark on a spectacular adventure to a private lagoon halfway across the world. However, their peaceful retreat soon becomes a terrifying fight for survival when a killer whale seeks vengeance for a life in captivity.

programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: After arriving at New York's JFK airport, Viktor Navorski gets unwittingly caught in bureaucratic glitches that make it impossible for him to return to his home country or enter the U.S.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: An old-school anchorman who quit his longtime evening newscast because of its new, gossipy ways is recruited by a hotshot producer who's looking to revive a failing morning show.

programme.title: Adventureland

programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: War of the Worlds

programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and no results. On this fateful night, Max has to transport Vincent on his next job - one night, five stops, five hits and a getaway.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: The Man Who Fell To Earth
programme.desc: Thomas Jerome Newton (David Bowie) is a humanoid alien who comes to Earth to get water for his dying planet. He starts a high technology company to get the billions of dollars he needs to build a return spacecraft.

programme.title: Popeye

programme.desc: John (Wesley Snipes) and Charlie (Woody Harrelson) are partners, best friends, and foster brothers. Both are transit cops who work undercover on the New York subway.

programme.title: Nightcrawler
programme.desc: A freelance cameraman (Jake Gyllenhaal) goes to increasingly greater lengths to get shots of the most-lurid and disturbing crimes on the dark streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Revolver

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman gets caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home and works against the clock to stop a deadly attack to save the lives of his fellow passengers.

programme.title: Shooter

programme.title: Bumblebee
